---
title: "Design and FPGA-Based Prototyping of a Daisy-Chainable LED Driver System for Aircraft Cabin Lighting Using Open-Source EDA Tools"
author:
  - name: "Sneha Shree Katepalli"
    email: "skatepalli@hs-bremen.de"
    orcid: ""
    corresponding: true
    roles: "Lead author"
    affiliation:
      - id: hsb
      - name: "Hochschule Bremen - City University of Applied Sciences"
        city: "Bremen"
        state: "Germany"
        url: "https://www.hs-bremen.de"
        department: "School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences"

output-file: expose_ssk

date: "15 December 2025"
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
# license: "Apache-2.0 license"

reader-mode: true

page-footer:
  left: |
    Design and FPGA-Based Prototyping of a Daisy-Chainable LED Driver System for Aircraft Cabin Lighting Using Open-Source EDA Tools
  right: |
    This book was built with <a href="https://quarto.org/">Quarto</a>.
# cover-image: images/hsb-logo.png
# favicon: images/hsb-logo.png
# site-url: https://sneha.github.io/thesis
repo-url: https://gitlab.on.hs-bremen.de/skatepalli/thesis_sneha
repo-branch: main
repo-actions: [edit,issue]
downloads: [pdf]

# Bibliography
bibliography: _bibliography/references.bib
csl: _bibliography/ieee.csl

number-sections: true
highlight-style: pygments

---

{{< include /content/01_front_matter.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/02_main_matter.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/03_back_matter.qmd >}}
